text.title: Freelancer to SaaS Time-Box Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `freelancer-to-saas-time-box`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: milestone with deliverable 'launch' but no metric
